question_text: Let О© = {1, 2, 3, вҖҰ } and в„Ӣ be the collection of all subsets of О©. Let рқ‘ғ be a probability measure on в„Ӣ such that рқ‘ғ({рқ‘ҳ}) = 2рқ‘ҳвҒЎ, рқ‘ҳвүҘ1.
